problem id: 5ec86a30
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6) XOR NOT SHL(3)

examples:
  00100100 -> 11010110
  01100011 -> 00111111
  11000010 -> 01011111
  00011100 -> 00011000
  10000000 -> 11011111
  10101010 -> 00000101
  11111001 -> 01001001
  00111100 -> 00010000
  00111001 -> 01111001
  01011100 -> 00001000

query: 11101010
predicted answer: 00010101
